10 May 2026 Military News

Other Conflicts
News Reports

Current Operations

    Other Operations

    Operation Epic Fury / Operation Roaring Lion | Operation True Promise 4

  • Angry Words, But No Response Yet From Iran On US Peace Proposal RFE/RL 10 May 2026 -- The war in Iran and the wider Middle East appeared to be in a holding pattern late on May 9 as Washington awaited Iran's response to its latest peace proposal, while Tehran, which has not yet offered a formal reply, did maintain its belligerent stance toward the US.

  • Iranian air defense downs hostile drone in southwest, Army says Press TV 10 May 2026 -- Iran's integrated air defense network destroyed an enemy reconnaissance drone over the southwestern region of the country, the Iranian Army's public relations office announced on Monday.
  • 'Restraint is over': Iran vows decisive response to any attack on vessels Press TV 10 May 2026 -- A senior Iranian parliamentary spokesman has warned that any further aggression against Iranian vessels in the Persian Gulf will trigger a "heavy and decisive" response targeting US ships and military bases across the region.
  • Bulk carrier catches fire off Qatari coast as tensions remain high in Strait of Hormuz Press TV 10 May 2026 -- A bulk carrier has caught fire off the Qatari coast amid heightened tensions in the Strait of Hormuz in the wake of the US-Israeli war of aggression against Iran.
  • Iran's 'Mosquito Fleet' Turns the Persian Gulf Into a Nightmare for US Warships Sputnik 10 May 2026 -- Iranian authorities are using a so-called "mosquito fleet" of hundreds of boats to control the Strait of Hormuz, the Financial Times reported citing experts.

  • Trump Says US Still Has Potential Targets In Iran RFE/RL 10 May 2026 -- US President Donald Trump said that American military operations against Iran may not be over, suggesting the United States could still target additional sites if necessary.
  • Trump To Press Xi On Iran During Beijing Meeting, US Officials Say RFE/RL 10 May 2026 -- US President Donald Trump is expected to press Chinese leader Xi Jinping on Iran during their upcoming summit in Beijing, with senior US officials highlighting Washington's concerns about China's economic and technological ties to Tehran.
  • US Will Destroy Anyone Who Approaches Iran's Enriched Uranium - Trump Sputnik 10 May 2026 -- The United States will destroy anyone who approaches Iran's enriched uranium stockpiles, US President Donald Trump said.
  • Rubio Discusses Support For Qatari In Meeting With Al-Thani RFE/RL 10 May 2026 -- US Secretary of State Marco Rubio met with the prime minister of Qatar, a Middle East ally that reportedly has been working behind the scenes in an attempt to help mediate an end to the Iran war.

  • Netanyahu Says Iran's Enriched Uranium Must Be 'Taken Out' RFE/RL 10 May 2026 -- Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said on May 10 that Iran's enriched uranium must be "taken out" before any peace agreement with Tehran.
  • Israel Set Up Secret Base in Iraq to Launch Airstrikes Against Iran - Reports Sputnik 10 May 2026 -- Israeli authorities have established a secret military base in the Iraqi desert to launch airstrikes against Iran, the Wall Street Journal claims citing sources, including US officials.
  • Israel built secret desert base in Iraq to wage war on Iran: Report Press TV 10 May 2026 -- Israel established a hidden military base deep in Iraq's desert region to support its air strikes against the Islamic Republic of Iran, according to a report.

  • Despite Latest US Proposal For Peace, Iran's Officials Remain Hard-Line RFE/RL 10 May 2026 -- Iranian media said Tehran has sent a response to the latest US peace proposal, but the country's officials have maintained belligerent stance toward the United States.
  • Iranian Media: Tehran Has 'Responded' To US Peace Proposal RFE/RL 10 May 2026 -- Iran's response to the latest US proposal to reach an agreement to end the war has been sent to Pakistan as a mediator in the negotiations, the country's official news agency, IRNA, reported on May 10.
  • Iran peace plan demands war compensation, recognition of sovereignty over Hormuz Press TV 10 May 2026 -- Iran has submitted a comprehensive plan to end the US-Israeli war of aggression, insisting on full compensation for war damages and the lifting of all sanctions, according to an IRIB report.
  • 'History repeats itself': Iran FM spox invokes historic Roman defeat to warn US, Israel Press TV 10 May 2026 -- Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman has invoked a famous ancient Persian victory over Rome to send a message to today's adversaries, warning that history repeats itself for those who refuse to learn its lessons.
  • Countries no longer intimidated by US aircraft carriers: Iranian general Press TV 10 May 2026 -- A senior commander of the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) says the United States is no longer able to instill panic in other countries by moving its aircraft carriers in international waters.
  • Iran warns of 'decisive response' to any European naval deployment in Strait of Hormuz Press TV 10 May 2026 -- Iran has warned of "a decisive and immediate response" to any deployment of military vessels by European countries in the Strait of Hormuz, stressing that the Islamic Republic alone holds the authority to maintain security in the strategic maritime corridor.
  • Pezeshkian vows talks with US 'not surrender' but defense of national interests Press TV 10 May 2026 -- Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian declared that any negotiation with the United States is neither surrender nor retreat, but rather a determined effort to secure the nation's rights and unequivocally defend national interests.
  • Iran submits response to latest US proposal for ending aggression: Report Press TV 10 May 2026 -- Iran has submitted its official reply to the latest US proposal for reaching a deal that allows a permanent end to the US-Israeli war of aggression against the country.
  • Iran urges IAEA to drop 'political messaging', stick to mandate Press TV 10 May 2026 -- Iran says the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) should abandon political approaches and stick to its genuine mandate to prevent losing its credibility and effectiveness.
  • Iranian Armed Forces have upper hand in region despite US provocations: General Press TV 10 May 2026 -- A high-ranking military commander says Iranian Armed Forces have the upper hand in the region, despite US acts of aggression and mischief.
  • Countries obeying US sanctions will 'certainly face problems' in Strait of Hormuz, Iran's Army warns Press TV 10 May 2026 -- Iran's Army has warned that countries complying with US sanctions against the Islamic Republic will "certainly face problems" in passing through the Strait of Hormuz.
  • Iran's Supreme Leader Announces New Measures in Conflict With US - Reports Sputnik 10 May 2026 -- Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei has announced new measures to counter the United States and Israel during a meeting with Iranian armed forces Central Headquarters commander Ali Abdollahi, Iranian state broadcaster IRIB reported on Sunday.
  • Iran Pledges to Open 'New Battlefields' if US Attacks Again - Army Spokesman Sputnik 10 May 2026 -- Iran will scale up combat operations to new battlefields should the United States and Israel again start military aggression against Iran, Iranian army spokesperson Mohammad Akraminia said on Sunday.

  • US War on Iran Now Disrupts Global Fertilizer and Metal Supply Chains Sputnik 10 May 2026 -- The situation with Iran has led to problems with global sulfuric acid supplies, causing a sharp rise in its price, the Wall Street Journal reported.

  • Putin Again Says Russia Would Take, Store Iran's Enriched Uranium RFE/RL 10 May 2026 -- Russian President Vladimir Putin repeated the Kremlin's oft-stated offer to transport and store enriched uranium from Iran if it would help seal a deal to end the war in Iran.

  • Saudi Aramco says Hormuz disruption removed 1 billion barrels of oil from global supply Press TV 10 May 2026 -- Saudi oil giant Aramco says the world has lost about one billion barrels of oil since the joint US-Israeli war of aggression against Iran triggered the most severe shipping disruptions ever recorded in the Strait of Hormuz.
  • Qatar Confirms Report Of Drone Attack On Cargo Vessel RFE/RL 10 May 2026 -- Qatar said a drone hit a cargo vessel off its coast sparking a fire early on May 10.
  • Kuwaiti Military Reports Drones In Country's Airspace RFE/RL 10 May 2026 -- Kuwait announced that its military had detected several drones that entered the country's airspace early on May 10, marking the first such incident since the cease-fire in the Iran war came into effect on April 13.
  • HE GCCSG Condemns in the Strongest Terms the Egregious Iranian Attacks on the UAE and Kuwait; Affirms that Iran's Treacherous Approach Seeks to Destabilise Regional Security Gulf Cooperation Council 10 May 2026

Defense Policy / Programs

  • Fast, precise, ready: US, Moroccan airmen strengthen airlift capability Army News 10 May 2026 -- The sun presses down hard on the flightline, heat rising in waves from the concrete as wind cuts sharply across the open expanse. Behind a humming C-130 Hercules, airmen stand poised, measured, focused and alert. Every movement matters here. Every signal counts.
  • US Soldiers test autonomous systems during African Lion 26 in Morocco Army News 10 May 2026 -- U.S. Soldiers assigned to the 1st Battalion, 503rd Infantry Regiment, 173rd Mobile Brigade Combat Team (Airborne), conducted autonomous tactical vehicle training during African Lion 26 at Cap Draa, Tan-Tan, Morocco, April 30, 2026.
  • US personnel apply new innovative sustainment assessment during African Lion 26 Army News 10 May 2026 -- African Lion 26 continues to strengthen military partnerships across Africa, and this year's exercise introduced a new tool to advance that effort: the Assess, Advise, Advocate, and Integrate Operational Readiness and Sustainment Assessment. Instructors and trainers from the 79th Theater Sustainment Command helped lead the initiative, using the framework to close operational gaps and strengthen the enduring partnership between the United States and Morocco, April 20-May 8, 2026.
  • US, Moroccan airmen strengthen air battle management Army News 10 May 2026 -- Beneath the surface of the city, down a series of turns and stairwells, the noise of the outside world fades. In its place, quiet intensity, low voices, and the steady rhythm of decisions being made in seconds that could matter for lives.

  • NEPTUNE STRIKE 2026 - a premier enhanced Vigilance Activity (eVA) conducted in the Western and Central Mediterranean Sea. NATO Allied Air Command 10 May 2026 -- Led by Naval Striking and Support Forces NATO (STRIKFORNATO), headquartered in Oeiras, Portugal, NEPTUNE STRIKE 26 (NEST26) spanned the southern and south-eastern flanks, reinforcing the Alliance's readiness, cohesion, and responsiveness in a region of critical strategic importance. This iteration concluded on 30 April 2026 showcased the dynamic integration of advanced maritime strike capabilities in a demanding, multi-domain environment. The activity highlighted NATO's ability to project credible deterrence while remaining flexible and agile in the face of complex and rapidly evolving security challenges.

  • INS SAGARDHWANI ENHANCES INDIA-VIETNAM MARITIME & SCIENTIFIC COOPERATION India PIB 10 May 2026 -- INS Sagardhwani, the Indian Navy's oceanographic research vessel, concluded a successful visit to Cam Ranh, Vietnam from 04-08 May 2026, reinforcing the strong maritime and scientific partnership between India and Vietnam.

Defense Industry

Other Conflicts


    Ukraine Conflict News

    Operation Iron Swords / Operation Al-Aqsa Flood | Operation Northern Arrows | Giddeon's Chariots | Roaring Lion (Lebanon)

  • Israeli army struggles to counter Hezbollah's expanding drone operations: Report Press TV 10 May 2026 -- Israel is still searching to find effective countermeasures against the increasingly advanced drones deployed by the Hezbollah resistance movement in southern Lebanon, according to an Israeli media report, underscoring the regime's growing operational challenges in the region.
  • Israel's barbaric aggression martyrs 39 in Lebanon in single day of ceasefire violations Press TV 10 May 2026 -- The Israeli occupation forces unleashed a wave of savage airstrikes and artillery barrages across southern Lebanon on Saturday, martyring at least 39 people and wounding dozens more, according to Lebanon's Ministry of Public Health.

  • Israeli airstrikes kill three in Gaza amid continued ceasefire violations Press TV 10 May 2026 -- A series of Israeli drone strikes has killed three Palestinians, including a senior police official, and wounded several others amid continued violations of a ceasefire agreement by Israeli occupation forces.

    • Other Conflicts

  • OIC Condemns Terrorist Attack in Bannu District, Islamic Republic of Pakistan Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) 10 May 2026 -- The General Secretariat of the Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) has condemned the terrorist attack that targeted a police post in the Bannu area of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa province in north-western Pakistan, which resulted in the deaths and injuries of a number of security personnel

  • Azerbaijani President: There is no need to protect Armenia from us, we have achieved what we set out to achieve Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 10 May 2026 -- "We had no intention of destroying Armenia or depriving it of its independence," said President Ilham Aliyev during a meeting with residents in the city of Zangilan.
  • President Ilham Aliyev: As long as political forces in Armenian society continue to live with hatred toward Azerbaijan, we must remain vigilant Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 10 May 2026 -- "In total, 60,000 hectares of our forest fund were destroyed by the savage occupiers. Most of the destruction occurred in the Kalbajar and Lachin districts, but Zangilan also suffered," President Ilham Aliyev said during his meeting with residents in the city of Zangilan.
  • President Ilham Aliyev: Today, every inch of land within the territory of Azerbaijan belongs to the Azerbaijani people Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 10 May 2026 -- "The greatest dream of National Leader Heydar Aliyev was the liberation of our native lands from occupation. We—his successors—have fulfilled his testament," said President Ilham Aliyev during a meeting with residents in the city of Zangilan.
  • Jeyhun Bayramov: Unfortunately, there are still individuals with revanchist mindsets against Azerbaijan in Armenia Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 10 May 2026 -- "Armenia is currently on the threshold of a major political process. It is known that parliamentary elections will be held in Armenia on June 7. Since Armenia is a parliamentary republic, these elections are of critical importance for the country; the formation of the government depends entirely on the election results. One could say a tense struggle is underway, and various tools are being utilized in this direction," Foreign Minister Jeyhun Bayramov told journalists.

  • HE GCCSG Condemns the Attack Targeting the Moroccan City of Es-Semara; Underlines GCC Solidarity with the Sisterly Kingdom of Morocco Gulf Cooperation Council 10 May 2026

News Reports

  • Passengers leave hantavirus-hit cruise ship in Tenerife as WHO says outbreak 'not another COVID' UN News 10 May 2026 -- Passengers and crew from the cruise ship MV Hondius began disembarking in Tenerife on Sunday under a tightly coordinated international health operation led by Spanish authorities and the World Health Organization (WHO), as officials sought to reassure the public that the outbreak "is not another COVID."

  • Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov's answers to questions from the Moscow. Kremlin. Putin television programme, Moscow, May 10, 2026 Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 10 May 2026
  • Russia-China interaction is most important factor in stabilizing int'l relations: Putin Global Times 10 May 2026 -- Interaction between Russia and China is the most important factor in stabilizing international relations, Russian President Vladimir Putin said Saturday.
  • Construction of Russia's First Private Spaceport Planned for 2026 - Company Sputnik 10 May 2026 -- Russian private space company Space Energy plans to begin construction of its own spaceport in Primorsky Territory in 2026 for launching ultra-light rockets, the company told Sputnik.

  • Chinese ambassador to UK makes further representations over so-called verdict, urges London to stop anti-China political manipulation Global Times 10 May 2026 -- The Chinese Embassy in the UK released a statement on Sunday, urging the UK side to stop the anti-China political manipulation, stop wantonly arresting and convicting Chinese citizens in the UK.

  • Paraguay President Santiago Peña meets Tsai Ing-wen, wraps up Taiwan visit CNA 10 May 2026 -- Paraguayan President Santiago Peña held a meeting with former Taiwan President Tsai Ing-wen (蔡英文), during which both sides renewed their friendship and the two countries' commitment to each other, as Peña wrapped up his first state visit to Taiwan.
  • Taiwan's legislative speaker leads delegation to France, U.K. CNA 10 May 2026 -- Legislative Speaker Han Kuo-yu (韓國瑜) departed for France and the United Kingdom on Saturday, leading a multi-party delegation aimed at bolstering parliamentary diplomacy.
  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 10 May 2026

  • Mixed Column of KPA Three Services Attends Military Parade in Moscow KCNA 10 May 2026 -- A military parade was held at Red Square in Moscow on May 9 to celebrate the 81st anniversary of Russia's victory in the Great Patriotic War.

  • Imprisoned Iranian Nobel Laureate Narges Mohammadi Transferred To Tehran Hospital RFE/RL 10 May 2026 -- Jailed Iranian Nobel Peace Prize winner Narges Mohammadi has been transferred to a hospital in Tehran, her foundation said on May 10, amid reports that she is "on the brink of death" due to harsh prison conditions.
  • Intelligence forces bust two Mossad-linked terror teams across Iran Press TV 10 May 2026 -- Iranian intelligence forces have identified and dismantled two terror cells affiliated with the Israeli regime's Mossad spy agency during separate operations across the country.

  • President Herzog concludes official visit to Central America Israel MFA 10 May 2026 -- President Herzog and President Fernández Delgado discussed expanding bilateral cooperation and trade between Israel and Costa Rica. President Fernández Delgado also expressed her willingness to upgrade Costa Rica's diplomatic representation in Jerusalem to an embassy.

  • Macron begins East Africa tour as French influence wanes across continent Press TV 10 May 2026 -- French President Emmanuel Macron has begun a multi-country East Africa tour, visiting Egypt, Kenya, and Ethiopia in an effort to strengthen France's economic and strategic ties with the region.
